description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 11th; Weight 10 lbs.; Slot none; Price 3,300 gp DESCRIPTION These burial wrappings are made of fine, embroidered materials. When a body is placed inside, speaking a command word turns the body to dust. The magic of the shroud is usable only once, after which the wrappings become ordinary, fine cloth. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, disintegrate; Cost 1,650 gp
